mapper.select: select user_id from user_information where user_id=#{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into user_information( user_id, user_pw, user_name, user_birth, user_gender, user_email, user_tel, user_blurb, user_start_date )values( #{userId}, #{userPw}, #{userName}, #{userBirth}, #{userGender}, #{userEmail}, #{userTel}, #{userBlurb}, sysdate )
